creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
New utilities have been added to Unidesc, and it has been renamed
	"Unicode Utilities" / uniutils by the author. For consistency we
	should repocopy this port to sysutils/uniutils.

Fix: 

Please repocopy from ports/sysutils/unidesc to ports/sysutils/uniutils.
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
